src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/Application.general_idea: Refactor main method to capture the Spring Environment and print active profiles and datasource configuration for debugging purposes.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/Application.human_impl: SpringApplication app = new SpringApplication(Application.class); Environment env = app.run(args).getEnvironment(); System.out.println(...)

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Replace deprecated AuthenticationConfiguration-based AuthenticationManager bean with explicit ProviderManager and DaoAuthenticationProvider configuration.
Update SecurityConfig to depend on CustomUserDetailsService instead of the generic UserDetailsService interface.
Add /oauth2/token to the list of permitted URL patterns in the security filter chain.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Enable OpenID Connect (OIDC) support on the authorization server configurer.
Explicitly disable CSRF protection for the authorization server security filter chain.
Encode the client secret using a PasswordEncoder bean instead of storing it in plain text.
Register a JwtEncoder bean using NimbusJwtEncoder to support JWT signing.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/service/Bas.general_idea: Add @Transactional annotations to service methods to ensure proper transaction management.
Add @NonNull annotations to method parameters and return types for null-safety.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent to 3.5.11 to align with Java 21 support and latest framework features.
Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Upgrade springdoc-openapi to version 2.8.6 for compatibility with newer Spring Boot versions.
Define a property for ModelMapper version to centralize dependency management.
Define a property for Spring Security OAuth2 Authorization Server version.
Define a property for the Maven Compiler Plugin version to ensure compatibility with Java 21.
Switch OAuth2 Authorization Server dependency to use the defined version property.
Switch ModelMapper dependency to use the defined version property.
Add Spring Boot Configuration Processor to eliminate warnings about missing metadata for configuration properties.
Remove explicit version from Flyway dependency to inherit it from the Spring Boot parent BOM.
Configure Spring Boot Maven plugin to activate the 'dev' profile during packaging.
Explicitly configure Maven Compiler Plugin with Java 21 source/target and annotation processor paths for Lombok and Config Processor.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added the Maven wrapper directory to .gitignore to prevent committing generated wrapper scripts.
Added data.sql to .gitignore to exclude local database initialization scripts from version control.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the Docker base image from Eclipse Temurin JDK 17 to JDK 21 Alpine to align with the target Java version.

src/main/resources/application-dev.prope.general_idea: Changed H2 database file path from a hardcoded absolute path to a user-home relative path for better portability.
Removed unused server address binding and explicitly set the server port.
Changed Hibernate DDL auto strategy from 'none' to 'create' to automatically generate schema on startup.
Increased the refresh token validity duration significantly.
Added configuration for a default admin user.
Enabled password grant type in the custom OAuth2 configuration.
Renamed the authorization server issuer property to match the expected Spring Security OAuth2 format.
Explicitly enabled password, refresh-token, and client-credentials grant types for the authorization server.

src/main/resources/application-prod.prop.general_idea: Update the authorization server issuer property key to match the new Spring Security configuration structure.
Rename the resource server audience property to the plural form required by the updated library version.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: The default server port was changed from 8080 to 8888.

src/main/resources/data.sql.general_idea: Removed the explicit creation of the hibernate_sequence, likely because the application now relies on database-native ID generation strategies or a different sequence management approach compatible with the new environment.
src/main/resources/data.sql.human_impl: drop sequence if exists hibernate_sequence; create sequence hibernate_sequence start with 1000 increment by 1;

src/main/resources/data.sql.general_idea: Removed the 'avatar' column from the usuarios table schema and its corresponding value in the seed data, indicating a schema change where avatar storage was decoupled or removed.
src/main/resources/data.sql.human_impl: insert into usuarios (id, full_name, email, username, password, avatar, created_at, last_password_change_at) ... -> insert into usuarios (id, full_name, email, username, password, created_at, last_password_change_at) ...
